market_pulse: Strong Friday momentum across Strip venues with David Guetta headlining LIV Beach, Tiësto at OMNIA, and Zedd announced — competitive weekend setup with tech-house and mainstage energy dominating.

weekend_readiness.label: HIGH
factors: Multiple A-list DJ confirmations (David Guetta, Tiësto, Zedd)
LIV Beach and Nightclub both running strong lineups
Competitor saturation high across Wynn, Caesar's, MGM assets
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Push John Summit/Tiësto resident slots hard. Lean into guest list volume and VIP upsell. Capitalize on David Guetta availability window at LIV Beach Saturday.

content_gaps.description: Competitors (OMNIA, Zouk, Hakkasan) posting heavy countdown content and artist teasers for Friday/Saturday. LIV has opportunity for last-minute flash promotions.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Deploy 3-4 Instagram Stories with countdown clocks + John Summit/Tiësto clips; push to TikTok creators via DM for 24h takeovers

content_gaps.description: XS, Encore, and OMNIA actively tagging micro-influencers (@globeth0tter, @edsonvegasclubpromoter). LIV has promoter presence (@livlvguestlist) but underutilizing creator partnerships.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Reach out to @globeth0tter for honest review collab; offer comp + VIP bottle for UGC content featuring John Summit set

content_gaps.description: LIV Beach has low behind-the-scenes/staff storytelling vs. Encore (lily pad golden hour shots) and TAO Beach (rooftop energy clips). Visual differentiation opportunity.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Film day-shift preparation reels: setup, sound check, bartender prep. Post 1-2 BTS Stories daily during operating hours.

influencer_activity.mention: Posted honest reviews of both LIV Nightclub and XS Nightclub with guest list access and backstage content. High engagement on EDM/Vegas night life content.
Viral OMNIA Nightclub chandelier video (2.3M likes) + Hakkasan/TAO Beach reviews. Strong club promoter credibility and audience.
Posted 60-second LIV Beach walkthrough video shortly after opening, showcasing dayclub energy and capacity buildup.

liv_outreach_targets.reason: Proven Vegas nightclub review audience; cross-posted to both LIV Nightclub and XS. Can drive credible guest list interest.
liv_outreach_targets.action: DM offer: Comp + $200 bottle service for John Summit set review (Fri/Sat)

story_activity.summary: Friday lineup confirmed: @djkailatroy. Saturday: @davidguetta. Sunday: @djirvg. Active promotion across IG Stories.
Weekend lineup: @followthefishtv (Fri 4/11 — already passed), @deseolatinsundays (4/12), @djrobguson (4/14), @zedd (4/17 Friday), @deorro (4/18 Saturday).
Fri 4/17: @noizusound. Sat 4/18: @liltunechi + AYU Dayclub events. Tech-house focus.

venues.summary: Strong Friday momentum with John Summit at Fontainebleau. Active promoter presence (@livlvguestlist) driving guest list signups. Resident DJ confirmed.

raw_posts.content_summary: @globeth0tter posted honest review of LIV Nightclub as guest list attendee, featuring backstage access and John Summit mentorship angle. Positive reception, EDM focus.
LIV Las Vegas official feed (@livlv): 641 posts total, most recent showing Fri April 10 - @dombresky, Sat April 11 - @cloonee, Sun April 12 - @marcostrous. Meet under the Halo theme.
Edwin Griffiths promoter post: Dom Dolla event with guest list details and bottle service promo code. Free female entry + 2 drink tickets until 1:15PM.
LIV Nightclub official events page updated with April 27 Matroda booking + BTC 2026 Kickoff Party w/ DJ Precise. Resident artist lineup includes John Summit, Tiësto, David Guetta, Dom Dolla.

venues.summary: Daytime pool party energy strong. Official Instagram (@livbeach) announcing David Guetta Saturday and @djirvg Sunday. 38K followers. Promotional post volume steady.

raw_posts.content_summary: LIV Beach official (@livbeach): 441 posts total. Recent lineup: Fri April 17 - @djkailatroy, Sat April 18 - @davidguetta, Sun April 19 - @djirvg. 'An all-new day life oasis' branding.
@lydiainvegas posted 60-second walkthrough of LIV Beach dayclub interior, showing capacity, decor, and crowd energy. Emphasized Friday/Saturday peak times and post-1PM crowding.
John Summit event promo: Multi-creator TikTok content featuring spring break attendees, girl group outfits, John Summit hype. 'Day 2 outfits' beach club aesthetic.

venues.summary: Solid Instagram presence (@xslasvegas, 308K followers) with 4,190 posts. Insider tips and guest list focus via promoters. 'Where every night deserves an Encore' positioning.

raw_posts.content_summary: XS Las Vegas official (@xslasvegas): 308K followers, 4,190 posts. Recent: 'Where every night deserves an Encore 🎶✨' tagline. Located inside Wynn Las Vegas.
@globeth0tter posted honest review of XS Nightclub on guest list: pros/cons, honest assessment, tech-house vibe review. Competitive positioning vs. LIV.
Promoter account @normanjay_lasvegas: 176K followers, 1,799 posts. XS / Encore nightclub and dayclub promoter services. Active F1 Vegas weekend promos.

venues.summary: High-follower Instagram presence (@encorebeachclub, 285K followers, 3,864 posts). Wynn asset with 'Unforgettable days, Unstoppable nights' branding. Golden hour photography focus.

raw_posts.content_summary: Encore Beach Club official (@encorebeachclub): 285K followers, 3,864 posts. Tagline: 'Unforgettable days, Unstoppable nights 🍾💫'. David Guetta confirmed appearance.
Golden hour pool photography content: Upper cabana lifestyle shots, lily pad seating, sunset vibes. Strong aesthetic differentiation from competitors.
Encore Beach Club guest list service: 4,791 IG followers (@encorebeachclubguestlist) offering free VIP + drink specials for Encore, Surrender, Intrigue, XS.

venues.summary: Highest IG follower count: 458K (@omnianightclub, 3,513 posts). Zedd confirmed for Fri April 17. Heavy EDM lineup (Deorro, Follow The Fish). Deseo Latin Sundays recurring.

raw_posts.content_summary: OMNIA official (@omnianightclub): 458K followers, 3,513 posts. This weekend lineup: 4/11 @followthefishtv, 4/12 Deseo Latin Sundays, 4/14 @djrobguson, 4/17 @zedd, 4/18 @deorro.
@edsonvegasclubpromoter viral OMNIA chandelier video: 2.3M likes, 13.4K comments. 'Satisfaction in the main room with the life changing chandelier.' High cultural impact.
OMNIA official TikTok (@omnialasvegas): 53 Following, 323.3K Followers. Nightlife music and lights content, Caesars Palace positioning.

venues.summary: No dedicated beach club entity found. OMNIA Nightclub presence strong but beach/pool component not separately marketed.
Tech-house positioning at Resorts World. Fri 4/17: @noizusound, Sat 4/18: @liltunechi + AYU Dayclub. 249K IG followers (@zoukgrouplv), 2,833 posts. Upscale casual dress code.

raw_posts.content_summary: Zouk Group official (@zoukgrouplv): 249K followers, 2,833 posts. Fri 4/17 - @noizusound, Sat 4/18 - @liltunechi, AYU Dayclub events. Tech-house and trap focus.
Zouk Las Vegas dedicated account (@zouk.lv): 12K followers, 253 posts. Official guest list contact (702) 415-0969. Table reservations promoted.
Dress code and insider tips content: Upscale casual, no athletic wear, dress shoes required. Travis Scott and cutting-edge artist positioning.

venues.summary: MGM Grand flagship venue with 258K IG followers (@hakkasannightclub, 6,388 posts). R&Bae Wednesdays recurring. Tao Group Hospitality concept. High-profile after-party positioning.

raw_posts.content_summary: Hakkasan Nightclub official (@hakkasannightclub): 258K followers, 6,388 posts. Upcoming: 4/15 R&Bae Wednesdays, 4/16 @twinsick, 4/17 @fourcolorzack, 4/18 @djpaulyd.
Cardi B after-party announcement: 'CARDI b official after party announced at Hakkasan Nightclub.' Celebrity positioning and high-profile event leverage.
@edsonvegasclubpromoter review: Hakkasan as decade-long Vegas top club inside MGM Grand, featuring EDM satisfaction sound design.

venues.summary: MGM Grand (NOT Venetian — correction noted). Palm Springs-inspired aesthetics. 232K IG followers (@palmtreebeachclub, 114 posts). Replaced Wet Republic. Kygo & Tao Group partnership.

raw_posts.content_summary: Palm Tree Beach Club official (@palmtreebeachclub): 232K followers, 114 posts (newer account). Lush Palm Springs-inspired dayclub oasis at MGM Grand.
Las Vegas Weekly feature: 'Palm Tree Beach Club took over Wet Republic space last summer and is returning 2026 with world-class entertainment, cocktails, finger foods.'

venues.summary: Rooftop daytime oasis at Venetian with 92K IG followers (@taobeach, 460 posts). Tiësto April 11 confirmed. Asian-inspired tropical positioning. Multi-sensory party concept.

raw_posts.content_summary: TAO Beach official (@taobeach): 92K followers, 460 posts. Premier Las Vegas dayclub at Venetian Resort. Tiësto April 11 appearance confirmed.
EDC Week day party lineup: @porterrobinson, @djsnake, @steveaoki, @rozmus. Rooftop pool energy and tropical atmosphere content.
@edsonvegasclubpromoter review: TAO Beach as 'best rooftop pool party in the city' at Venetian with DJ talent and multi-sensory experience.
